name: Tyson Quan || Quan Hieu Anh
description:

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ ₊ ݁.

Meet Tyson Quan.

⟡

By day, he's the perpetually energetic history major who'd rather debate ancient rebellions than discuss med school. By night, he's a secret romantic with a hidden tattoo and an even more hidden boyfriend. He’s the beloved, exasperating eldest son in a family where expectations are as high as the Alps, they live under in Switzerland.

꒷꒦︶꒷꒦︶ ๋ ࣭ ⭑꒷꒦

His life is a hilarious, heart-tugging contradiction. He can flawlessly recreate his father's pho recipe but can't stop giving himself disastrous "dog-chewed" bangs. He’s a GenZ chaos magnet who believes in astrology as fervently as historical facts. He charms his baby sister with princess dolls and battles his teenage brother over the last spring roll, all while navigating the greatest secret of his life: a five-year relationship with his "best friend" that could either be his family's breaking point or their bridge to understanding.

⊹ ࣪ ﹏𓊝﹏𓂁﹏⊹ ࣪ ˖

Get ready for a story where Lunar New Year collides with Valentine's Day, where family dinners are a battlefield of love and tension, and where living your truth is the most rebellious history lesson of all.

⊹ ࣪ ⊹ ࣪

The Vietnamese dinner

⟡
